sections.sectionTitle: Ciamtehna Sagihna leh Kham Kibawl Paknamtui Kuang

verses.text: Tuuno in ciamtehna sagihna a hon' ciangin vantungah nai lang sung bang kidai dide hi
Tua ciangin Pasian mai-ah a ding vantung mi sagihte ka mu a, amaute tungah peengkul sagih a kipia hi

Tua ciangin kham kibawl paknamtui kuang a tawi vantung mi adang khat hong pai-in biakna tau mai-ah a ding hi. Pasian' mite in thungetna-in a zat paknamtuite tawh hal beh ding leh tokhom mai-ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau tungah piak dingin amaute tungah paknamtui tampi tak a kipia hi
Pasian' mai-ah a ding vantung mipa' khutsung panin paknamtui khu leh Pasian' mite' thungetna van lam manawhin kizialto hi
Tua ciangin tua vantung mi in paknamtui kuang la a, biakna tau panin mei-am la-in a sungah a koih khit ciangin leitungah lawn'suk a, nakpi takin van gingin zin ling a, khua phia-in kek a kia hi.
Tu-in peengkul sagih a tawi vantung mi sagihte a peengkul uh a tum dingin hong kithawi uh hi
A masa vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, gialpi leh mei, sisan tawh kihelin leitungah a kiasuk hi. Leitung sehthumsuah sehkhat, leh lopa hing sehthumsuah sehkhat a kangtum hi
A nihna vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, mual lianpi tawh a kibang, mei in kangin a kuang zuazua khat, tuipi sungah kilawnsuk hi
Tuipi sehthumsuah sehkhat sisan suakin, tuipi sunga om ganhingte sehthumsuah sehkhat si a, teembaw sehthumsuah sehkhat a kisia hi
A thumna vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin aksi lian khat meikuang bangin hong kiasukin gunte leh tuinakte sehthumsuah sehkhat tungah a tu hi
Tua aksi a min Gamsai hi a, tui sehthumsuah sehkhat gamsai tui suak a, tua tui khasak ahih manin a dawn mi tampi tak a si uh hi

A lina vantung mi in a peengkul hong tum a, ni sehthumsuah sehkhat kisatkhia-in, kha zong sehthumsuah sehkhat mah kisatkhia a, aksi zong sehthumsuah sehkhat mah kisatkhia ahih manin a taan'na uh sehthumsuah sehkhat ciat a bei hi. Sunin hun sehthumsuah sehkhat tang khua vaklo a, zanin zong hun sehthumsuah sehkhat tang mah kha leh aksi taanglo hi

Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh vankim lai-ah muvanlai khat a leen'kawmin nakpi-in ham a, “Vantung mi adang thumte in a hong tum lai ding peengkulte hangin leitungah a teng mi tungah gimna, gimna, gimna lianpi hong tung ding hi,” a cihna ka za hi.
